title: The Old Well
description: An ancient stone well stands alone beside the road. As you peer into its depths, you hear a faint voice whisper, 'Make a wish... but every wish has a price.'

options.title: Make a Wish
options.description: Toss a few coins into the well and hope someone—or something—is listening.

options.title: Climb Into the Well
options.description: If everyone throws coins into the well, surely nobody will miss a few.

options.title: Ignore the Well
options.description: Some mysteries are best left unexplored.
